name: Jerk Chicken Fajitas with Papaya-Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: Boneless chicken breast (1 lb), cut into halves
Black beans, cooked and mashed (1 1/2 cups)
Serrano or jalapeno chili, seeded and minced (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken breast halves with jerk seasoning.
2. Marinate at least 1 hour or overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Place chicken in an 8-inch square dish; cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Microwave on medium-high for 7-8 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes.
5. Slice chicken into thin strips.
6. Divide black beans, chicken strips, sour cream, and salsa between tortillas.
7. Fold one edge of the tortilla to form a pocket and roll to hold the filling.
PAPAYA PINEAPPLE SALSA:
1. Combine papaya, pineapple, jicama, red onion, chili pepper, garlic, lime zest, lime juice, and cilantro in a bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
3. For best flavor and texture, do not make more than 2 hours before serving.
